name: app-vitals-marketplace
description: A marketplace of Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: changelog-review
plugins.description: Walk through git commits one at a time to review what shipped. Summarizes API, web, schema, and business logic changes per commit with interactive Q&A.

plugins.name: damage-control
plugins.description: Defense-in-depth protection for Claude Code. Blocks dangerous commands and protects sensitive files via PreToolUse hooks. Features pattern-based blocking, ask confirmations, and three-tier path protection.

plugins.name: dependabot-review
plugins.description: AI-powered triage of Dependabot PRs. Posts patrol-style risk assessments on individual PRs and bulk-processes all open Dependabot PRs to get them merge-ready.

plugins.name: discovery-report
plugins.description: Generate a polished dark-theme HTML discovery report for any technical or organizational investigation. Interviews the user, gathers evidence, and produces a self-contained HTML file.

plugins.name: distill
plugins.description: Distill conversations into persistent context files. Extracts long-term facts, goals, and decisions into your project's context/ directory before clearing.

plugins.name: entropy-patrol
plugins.description: Continuous code health enforcement via golden principles. Scans for drift and opens focused PRs to fix it.

plugins.name: learning-loop
plugins.description: Captures corrections, discoveries, and preferences as you work with Claude. Stores learnings in CLAUDE.md, promotes to global scope, and helps contribute improvements back to marketplace plugins.

plugins.name: meeting-transcripts
plugins.description: Browse and read meeting transcripts captured by the mt CLI tool. Provides a /transcripts command to list, search, and read recordings by time reference.

plugins.name: pr-review
plugins.description: Interactive PR review workflow with local drafts, CLAUDE.md compliance checking, auto-detected follow-ups, and parallel batch processing via cloud-agent.

plugins.name: ralph-orchestrator
plugins.description: Structured orchestration for Ralph loops with PRD support, progress tracking, TDD guidance, and escape hatches

plugins.name: repo-readiness
plugins.description: Agent-readiness audit and bootstrapping. Scores a repo across 5 categories (agent context, docs, structure, tests, observability) and generates missing assets with --fix. Run before /plan-session on a new codebase.

plugins.name: shipwright
plugins.description: Structured dev pipeline with plan sessions, task execution, autonomous dev loops, multi-agent code review, and integrated project research for any software project.

plugins.name: terraform
plugins.description: Opinionated Terraform best practices for Claude Code. Enforces exact version pinning, conservative tagging, pre-commit validation, Terratest generation, state isolation, module composition, variable validation, and naming conventions.
